name_en: P 🌹 (Small) 🎉 New Arrival 🎉 1BD292A 🎉 This System soft lambskin shoulder bag is embellished with a triangular pattern crafted with exquisite stitching, highlighting the brand's craftsmanship. The flap design features a chain handle that evokes jewelry associations / and is detachable. The front metal-engraved logo is outlined by the iconic triangular stitching, showcasing the brand's style. Can be carried by hand / shoulder / crossbody, highly functional 👍. If you like it, get yours now 🎉🎉
